title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - **Already working (code/tested):** auth-stale is detected and surfaced with a primary reauth CTA, and the flow is wired to `authLoginEndpoint` with token persistence to shared auth storage (`test-auth-reentry.js`, `test-auth-stale-reauth-smoke.js`, `auth/auth.js`). - **Already working (safety):** `returnTo` is sanitized to `/happy/*` only, so post-login redirect can restore task/screen context but rejects unsafe/external targets (`test-auth-gateway.js`, `test-auth-gateway-runtime.js`). - **Needs runtime confirmation on device:** real login for `masa.stage1@gmail.com` against the live `/api/cockpit/auth/login` (or Access path), then iPhone/PWA redirect back to the exact `returnTo` state with tasks visible. - **Needs runtime confirmation on device:** after login, remote event/state sync must recover from prior 401 in real backend conditions (not mock), including refresh-token path behavior. - **Highest-risk failure after login:** user appears signed in, but token/refresh mismatch causes repeated 401 retry loops, leaving `Now/Tasks` stale despite successful UI login (auth recovered in UI, authoritative feed not recovered).
